block_03: You have successfully passed the Assessment! Your assessment account has been closed in preparation for your Funded Account. Now it’s time to sign the Trader’s Agreement, pass the AML/KYC verification, and set up your live account.
block_04: You will find attached to this email the Traders Agreement. We kindly ask you to download it, print it, sign it by hand, and send it to kyc@sabiotrade.com along with the following documents:
block_05: 1- An original picture of your ID, Passport, or Driving License. The document should not be expired, it should contain your date of birth and a recent picture.
block_06: 2- A bank statement showing your address, a utility bill, a residence certificate from the municipality, or a Tax bill. This document shouldn't be older than 6 months.
block_07: You'll receive your live account credentials within 24-72 hours after passing the verification and signing the Agreement.
